entries.title: Develop Latin reading proficiency through narratives about a Roman family. Study Latin grammar and vocabulary. Build mastery through copywork, composition, narration, and dictation.
entries.label: Develop Latin reading proficiency through narratives about a Roman family. Study Latin grammar and vocabulary. Build mastery through copywork, composition, narration, and dictation.
entries.content:
Prerequisite: Level 1. Students just beginning Latin should start at Level 1. 

This course may be counted as 1/2 credit for High School and is based on the same text as the Latin 2 Video Course, but without the accountability and structure of an online course platform and recorded class videos. Students work through lesson plans for this course as in other subjects.
